items.title: Accredited official statistics: Fuel Poverty report: 2025
items.summary: The report includes data on the number of households living in fuel poverty in England, an analysis of the composition of the fuel poor group in 2025, and projections of the number of households in fuel poverty in 2026.

items.title: Official Statistics: Warm Homes: Local Grant statistics - February 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Warm Homes: Local Grant scheme in England.

items.title: Official Statistics: Warm Homes: Social Housing Fund statistics - February 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Warm Homes: Social Housing Fund scheme in England.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Road fuel prices: 30 March 2026
items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.title: Scheme design for bill discounts for new transmission network infrastructure
items.summary: We're seeking views on scheme design for a bill discount scheme to directly benefit people living close to new and significantly upgraded electricity transmission infrastructure.

items.title: Policy paper: UK Emissions Trading Scheme (UK ETS): policy overview
items.summary: The role of the UK Emissions Trading Scheme in UK decarbonisation and how the UK ETS Authority is developing the scheme.

items.title: Home Energy Model: Future Homes Standard assessment
items.summary: We're seeking views on the methodology which will assess whether new dwellings demonstrate compliance with the Future Homes Standard.

items.title: Policy paper: DESNZ small and medium-sized enterprise (SME) action plan: 2025 to 2028
items.summary: DESNZ is backing your business by making it easier for small businesses to access public sector supply chains, removing unnecessary burdens and costs.

items.title: Policy paper: DBT small and medium-sized enterprise (SME) action plan: 2025 to 2028
items.summary: The Department for Business and Trade (DBT) is backing your business by making it easier for small businesses to access public sector supply chains, removing unnecessary burdens and costs.

items.title: Corporate report: DESNZ procurement policy
items.summary: How the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) buys goods, services, and works.

items.title: Trade Envoy appointed to Japan
items.summary: The Business and Trade Secretary has appointed David Taylor MP as Trade Envoy to Japan.

items.title: Warm Homes Fund: innovative finance for investments and loans
items.summary: We're seeking information on where government financing can help support building decarbonisation.

items.title: Fair Work Agency Advisory Board appointed ahead of April launch
items.summary: New board features members from a range of backgrounds and will advise ministers on the strategy and direction of the Fair Work Agency.

items.title: Notice: Alternative Energy Markets Innovation Programme: projects
items.summary: The Alternative Energy Markets Innovation Programme developed and tested innovative tariffs, products and services under alternative energy market scenarios.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Guidance: Design and construct new builds to enable smart meter installations
items.summary: Guidance on how to design and construct domestic and non-domestic new build premises so that smart meters can be installed and commissioned in them from the outset.

items.title: Time to Pay Up: Government unveils toughest crackdown on late payments in over 25 years
items.summary: Small businesses to be backed by new, stronger measures to tackle late payments.

items.title: Late payments: tackling poor payment practices
items.summary: We are seeking views on legislative measures which address late, long and disputed business-to-business payments, and the use of retention clauses in construction contracts.

items.title: Correspondence: Minister Blair McDougall  - Letter to businesses on upcoming late payment reforms - 24 March 2026
items.summary: Letter from the Minister for Small Business and Economic Transformation to businesses, giving notification of changes to Government policy on late payments.

items.title: Government to make “plug-in solar” available within months
items.summary: “Plug-in” solar panels to be in shops within months, offering households chance to significantly cut energy bills.

items.title: Notice: Trade remedies notices: anti-dumping duty on imports of tin mill products originating from China
items.summary: Trade remedies notices published by the Secretary of State for Business and Trade relating to the anti-dumping duty on imports of tin mill originating from China.

items.title: Notice: Trade remedies notices: registration of imports of tin mill products originating from China
items.summary: Trade remedies notices published by the Secretary of State for Business and Trade relating to the registration of imports of tin mill products originating from China.

items.title: UK Emissions Trading Scheme: Treatment of sustainable aviation fuel
items.summary: The UK ETS Authority is seeking views on options for the future treatment of sustainable aviation fuels (SAF) in the UK ETS.

items.title: Corporate report: Annual statement of emissions for 2024
items.summary: Seventeenth annual statement of emissions required under section 16 of the Climate Change Act 2008.

items.title: Welsh steel industry backed with new trade measure and strategy
items.summary: UK steel producers and thousands of steel workers in Wales will benefit from a landmark Steel Strategy.

items.title: Research: Life sciences competitiveness indicators, 2026
items.summary: Data on the life sciences sector in the UK and other countries.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas.

items.title: Notice: Trade remedies notice: registration of imports of glass containers originating from China
items.summary: Trade remedies notice published by the Secretary of State for Business and Trade relating to the registration of imports of glass containers originating from China.

items.title: Notice: Trade remedies notice: registration of imports of glass containers originating from Turkey
items.summary: Trade remedies notice published by the Secretary of State for Business and Trade relating to the registration of imports of glass containers originating from Turkey.

items.title: Official Statistics: Fuel Poverty sub-regional report: 2024
items.summary: Estimates of sub-regional fuel poverty in England in 2024.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Energy code reform: Code manager licence conditions and code modification appeals to the CMA
items.summary: DESNZ and Ofgem are seeking views on proposals for energy code manager licence conditions and code modification appeals to the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA).

items.title: Transparency data: DESNZ: workforce management information, February 2026
items.summary: Reports on departmental staff numbers and costs.

items.title: Policy paper: The UK's International Education Strategy 2026
items.summary: Strategy setting out the government’s plans for UK international education and how it will support the sector access global opportunities.

items.title: Notice: Notice to exporters 2026/07: submitting export licence applications under the Agreement on Defence Export Controls
items.summary: How to apply under articles 1 to 3, with an article 3 integration certificate template and completion guidance.

items.title: Policy paper: Steel strategy
items.summary: Strategy document setting out the government’s approach to the steel sector.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment core statistics book
items.summary: A monthly snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment position, summarising trade statistics produced by ONS, HMRC, DBT and others.

items.title: Official Statistics: UK trade in numbers
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s latest trade and investment position, summarising statistics produced by ONS, DBT, and UNCTAD.

items.title: Trade Minister Speech at Chatham House
items.summary: UK Trade Minister Chris Bryant gives a speech at the Chatham House Global Trade Conference.

items.title: Correspondence: Horizon Family Members Redress Scheme: letters from the Minister for Small Business and Economic Transformation
items.summary: Letters to Lost Chances and the Business and Trade Select Committee about the redress scheme for family members of postmasters affected by the Horizon scandal.
